message:
fix(pool): complete parking_lot migration + discard accounting

Remove all remaining .unwrap() calls on lock() — the parking_lot
migration in the prior round changed the import but missed the
actual call sites. Also alphabetize imports.

Add total_discards accounting to two previously uncounted paths:
  - return_connection() when pool is closed: now increments discard
    counter before disconnecting (was silently discarding)
  - close(): now increments discard counter by the number of idle
    connections drained

Update close_drains_idle and close_discards_returned_connections
tests to assert total_discards == 1.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
